fabrication_authority.notes: Fabrication follows the CAD/DXF revision, not generated images or prose summaries.

generated_checklist_notice: Generated checklists surface blockers for fabrication-owner review; they do not certify shop readiness or replace CAD, drawing, material, CAM, workholding, and safety review.

blocked_when: CAD/DXF source cannot be tied to the revision
material, machine, or workholding assumptions remain TBD
CAM operator must infer units, origin, scale, kerf, or depth
generated checklist is treated as a pass certificate without owner review
handoff_decision.ready_when: all gates are marked pass or explicitly waived by the fabrication owner after source review

readiness_gates.method: Compare CAD, DXF, drawing, and README revision IDs.
readiness_gates.notes: Block fabrication if any source file is stale or unnamed.
readiness_gates.target: all fabrication files identify revision r12

readiness_gates.method: Open DXF/CAD in CAM and verify a known dimension plus work origin.
readiness_gates.notes: Do not infer inches versus millimeters from visual scale.
readiness_gates.target: units, scale, origin, and stock zero are explicit
readiness_gates.tolerance: known dimension within 0.005 in or 0.1 mm

readiness_gates.method: Map every DXF layer/color to cut, engrave, pocket, drill, or ignore.
readiness_gates.notes: Unmapped geometry must be resolved before toolpath export.
readiness_gates.target: 100 percent of layers have operation intent

readiness_gates.method: Check stock size, thickness, flatness, grain/face orientation, and machine bed clearance.
readiness_gates.notes: Record substitutions as a new revision or explicit waiver.
readiness_gates.target: stock matches design callouts and fits selected machine

readiness_gates.method: Verify clamps, tape, tabs, vacuum zones, screws, and toolpath clearances.
readiness_gates.notes: Include hold-down locations in the repo or setup sheet.
readiness_gates.target: fixture does not conflict with cutting envelope
readiness_gates.tolerance: clearance exceeds tool radius plus safety margin

readiness_gates.method: Review tool library, feeds/speeds, cut depth, tabs, kerf compensation, and postprocessor.
readiness_gates.notes: CAM settings belong in the fabrication repo when they drive repeatability.

readiness_gates.method: Check posted shop rules, material policy, dust/fume controls, PPE, and emergency stop path.
readiness_gates.notes: Laser plastics and unknown coatings require material verification.
readiness_gates.target: material and operation are allowed by the shop

readiness_gates.method: Air cut or frame trace, then inspect the first article against critical dimensions.
readiness_gates.notes: Do not batch-run until the first article passes.
readiness_gates.target: dry run clear and first article within tolerance
